problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
